mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet_transactions(user_id, order_id, trade_id, type, amount, balance_after, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{tradeId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wallet_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 50
